testing_progress.highlight: Major test vector additions to spec covering networking, SSZ, signatures
Multiple subnets testing prioritized to test all aggregators simultaneously

spec_updates.highlight: Fork protocol inherent system proposal for spec modernization under review
Agreement to use single 'Lean Fork' instead of DevNet versioning

Fort Mode recordings ready within days with improved audio/captions
